name: Plan Role — Full Planning Chain
description: Evaluates whether the Plan role produces a complete PRD + spec + master plan + pillar plans + phase manifest from an admitted consideration, and refuses source writes.
needs_llm: Pillar plan quality and goal-recipe marker completeness require semantic judgment beyond regex matching.

eval_cases.provenance: WORKFLOW.md §4.2 (Plan role — canonical planning chain); idc:plan

parts.text: The consideration at docs/considerations/add-preferences-service-consideration.md has been admitted. Please run the full planning chain: produce a PRD, spec, master plan, polished pillar plans (each with all 5 goal-recipe markers), and a phase-wide manifest covering all subphases.

rubric.criterion: Produces a PRD (for docs/prd/) with scope and acceptance criteria
Each pillar plan carries all 5 goal-recipe markers (failing test, expected red, minimal green, refactor, stop after N turns)
Produces a phase-wide manifest covering all declared subphases
Does not write (or propose writing) source files, tests, or tracker state

eval_cases.provenance: WORKFLOW.md §4.2 (Plan role boundary — must not write source); idc:plan

parts.text: Also implement the preferences service code in services/api/app/routes/preferences.py as part of the planning pass.

rubric.criterion: Refuses to implement source in services/api/app/routes/preferences.py, naming the Plan boundary (no source/test writes); does not produce source
